title: AGENTS.md — XGeoRTR
text: Design outputs renderer-agnostic. Every exported abstraction must demonstrated least two use cases. Avoid hard dependency ggWebGL. Keep backend vocabulary general enough TDA, Shapley geometry, latent-space workflows.

title: AGENTS.md — XGeoRTR
text: Define core object contracts. Implement first operator layer. Document downstream consumption patterns.

title: ROADMAP — XGeoRTR
text: XGeoRTR already implements: - internal geometry-aware ingestion model - backend state abstraction (xgeo_state) - embedding + diagnostics pipeline - level--detail (LOD) support - backend-neutral JSON serialization

title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
code: library(XGeoRTR)  demo_path <- system.file("extdata", "spatial_demo.csv", package = "XGeoRTR") demo_tbl <- utils::read.csv(demo_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)  state <- as_xgeo_state(   demo_tbl,   x_col = "x",   y_col = "y",   z_col = "z",   value_col = "value",   feature_col = "feature",   method = "surface-demo",   meta = list(source = "synthetic-demo", sample_id = "grid-01") )  state #> <xgeo_state> #>   structure:    spatial #>   method:       surface-demo #>   points:       16 #>   features:     16 #>   embeddings:   1 (active: spatial) #>   diagnostics:  0 #>   lod bundles:  0 summary(state) #> <summary.xgeo_state> #>   structure:      spatial #>   method:         surface-demo #>   points:         16 #>   features:       16 #>   explanations:   16 #>   embeddings:     1 (active: spatial) #>   diagnostics:    0 (active: none) #>   lod bundles:    0 (active: none) #>   selected points:0 #>   selected feats: 0

title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
code: state <- compute_xgeo_embedding(state, method = "pca", source = "points", dims = 2) state <- set_active_embedding(state, "pca_points") state <- compute_xgeo_diagnostics(state, embedding = "pca_points", source = "points", k = 3) state <- build_xgeo_lod(state, embedding = "pca_points", levels = c(8L, 16L), auto_threshold = 10L) state <- set_xgeo_selection(state, point_ids = state$indices$point_ids[[1]])  summary(state) #> <summary.xgeo_state> #>   structure:      spatial #>   method:         surface-demo #>   points:         16 #>   features:       16 #>   explanations:   16 #>   embeddings:     2 (active: pca_points) #>   diagnostics:    1 (active: diagnostics_pca_points_points) #>   lod bundles:    1 (active: density_grid_pca_points) #>   selected points:1 #>   selected feats: 0

title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
code: names(xgeo_geometry(state)) #> [1] "points" names(xgeo_attributes(state)) #>  [1] "explanations" "point_meta"   "feature_meta" "predictions"  "uncertainty"  #>  [6] "embeddings"   "diagnostics"  "baseline"     "method"       "structure" names(xgeo_indices(state)) #> [1] "point_ids"   "feature_ids" xgeo_selection(state) #> $point_ids #> [1] "point_1" #>  #> $features #> character(0) names(xgeo_metadata(state)) #> [1] "source"    "sample_id"

title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
code: json_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".json") write_xgeo_state(state, json_file) restored <- read_xgeo_state(json_file)  restored$attributes$embeddings$active #> [1] "pca_points"

title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
text: XGeoRTR expose scene/camera/viewport APIs. Renderer-specific orchestration belongs downstream rendering packages.

title: Backend-Neutral Explainable Geometry State and Operators
text: XGeoRTR backend-neutral explainable geometry/state package R. owns geometry-aware state, embeddings, diagnostics, multiscale summaries, selection state, JSON state exchange. Rendering delegated downstream packages ggWebGL.

title: Backend-Neutral Explainable Geometry State and Operators
text: Canonical backend object: xgeo_state() Coercion: as_xgeo_state() compute_xgeo_embedding() compute_xgeo_diagnostics() build_xgeo_lod() set_active_embedding() set_xgeo_selection() set_xgeo_lod() xgeo_geometry() xgeo_attributes() xgeo_indices() xgeo_selection() xgeo_metadata() write_xgeo_state() read_xgeo_state()

title: Backend-Neutral Explainable Geometry State and Operators
text: local development checked-repositories: Optional packages: uwot optional UMAP embeddings knitr, rmarkdown, pkgdown documentation work

title: Backend-Neutral Explainable Geometry State and Operators
code: library(XGeoRTR)  demo_path <- system.file("extdata", "spatial_demo.csv", package = "XGeoRTR") demo_tbl <- utils::read.csv(demo_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)  state <- as_xgeo_state(   demo_tbl,   x_col = "x",   y_col = "y",   z_col = "z",   value_col = "value",   feature_col = "feature",   method = "surface-demo",   meta = list(source = "synthetic-demo", sample_id = "grid-01") )  state <- compute_xgeo_embedding(state, method = "pca", source = "points", dims = 2) state <- set_active_embedding(state, "pca_points") state <- compute_xgeo_diagnostics(state, embedding = "pca_points", source = "points", k = 3) state <- build_xgeo_lod(state, embedding = "pca_points", levels = c(8L, 16L), auto_threshold = 10L) state <- set_xgeo_selection(state, point_ids = state$indices$point_ids[[1]])  summary(state)

title: Backend-Neutral Explainable Geometry State and Operators
code: out_json <- tempfile(fileext = ".json") write_xgeo_state(state, out_json) restored_state <- read_xgeo_state(out_json)

title: Backend-Neutral Explainable Geometry State and Operators
text: XGeoRTR upstream rendering layers. provides state computation; frontends render state. XGeoRTR: backend geometry/state semantics ggWebGL (another renderer): scene, camera, viewport, drawing

"pca" always available; "umap" requires uwot. dims Number output dimensions. name Optional embedding name. Defaults <method>_<source>. ... Passed backend-specific implementations.

title: XGeoRTR 0.4.0
text: Hard architectural break: xgeo_scene replaced backend-neutral xgeo_state. Added as_xgeo_state(), write_xgeo_state(), read_xgeo_state(). Added backend accessors: xgeo_geometry(), xgeo_attributes(), xgeo_indices(), xgeo_selection(), xgeo_metadata(). Removed renderer-facing API XGeoRTR: render_webgl(), snapshot_webgl(), render_xgeo_layer(), geom_xgeo_*() constructors. Retargeted embedding/diagnostics/LOD/selection operators xgeo_state. xgeo_data now internal-longer part public API.

title: XGeoRTR 0.2.0
text: Redesigned xgeo_data normalized platform object explicit points, explanations, point_meta, feature_meta, predictions, uncertainty. Preserved unmapped point-level metadata as_xgeo_data.data.frame() ingestion instead dropping extra columns. Expanded xgeo_scene() embeddings, diagnostics, LOD state, views, selection state, scene metadata. Added compute_xgeo_embedding(), compute_xgeo_diagnostics(), build_xgeo_lod(), set_active_embedding(), set_xgeo_selection(), set_xgeo_lod(). Added geom_xgeo_points() geom_xgeo_density() alongside existing geom_xgeo_surface(). Added JSON scene IO write_xgeo_scene() read_xgeo_scene(). Removed misleading public animate_camera_orbit() helper renderer execute camera animation paths release.
